string 2:
That Digimon is back in line again. It should seriously
learn the spell before coming.

*panting* This time... This time I shall be able to order
for sure!
{next}Are you all right?
{next}Why are you so tired?
{next}There's something suspicious about you...

No, I am not okay... I am about to starve to death... My
life force is ebbing away...
I am not exhausted... I am... about to die of hunger...

No, there is nothing suspicious about me! I am just a plain
ol' ramen lover!

This shop has a unique ordering process. I am always told I
am guilty and get kicked out.

I am sure my master, whom I am supposed to meet in the
Paradise Colosseum, is enraged. I am late...
{next}Are you Jesmon?
{next}Is Gankoomon your master?
{next}Are you a Royal Knight?
How do you know me?! Who are you...?
How do you know my master?! Who are you...?
How do you know my affiliation?! Who are you...?

...I see. My master has not arrived at the rendezvous point,
either, so you came to look?

I shall be on my way immediately... as soon as I eat this
Yaro-kei ramen!

But how should I order...? Do you happen to know the correct
way of ordering?
{next}Say, "With extra garlic."
{next}Say, "With extra vegetables."
{next}Say, "Regular, please."
"Extra garlic"...? Understood! I shall give it a try!
I am back... Ulp. The smell of garlic was quite intense...
"Extra vegetables"...? Understood! I shall give it a try!

I am back... Ulp. I did not quite expect that volume of bean
sprouts...

"Regular"? Is it really that simple?! Understood! I shall
give it a try!
I am back! I enjoyed it very much!

The oil and the scent of the garlic are amazing! You sure 
know your ramen!
I want to thank you for helping me! Please accept this!

Phew. Now I can report victory to my master! I could not say
I lost to a ramen order.

If you keep trying until you win, you will always win. That
is my motto.

Well, I shall now go back to my master and give an update on
the Royal Knights!
